---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality or an improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature
---

<!--
Title convention: keep a bracketed prefix and add a short summary, e.g.
"[FEATURE] Let providers pause inquiries while away" or use a more specific
prefix like [UI], [SETUP], [DOCUMENTATION] where it fits.

Labels: this template applies the `feature` type label. Please also add the
relevant `service:` label (service: api-gateway / identity / provider /
review / job / notification / media / chat) and any area label (backend, ui,
i18n, deploy, …). Swap `feature` for `enhancement` if it's an improvement to
existing behavior rather than new functionality.
-->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should happen. -->

## Affected service / area

<!-- Which service(s) or part of the app would this touch? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches, and why this one. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links, related issues. -->
